metadata.description:
# Advanced ChordGun
An expanded chord composition tool for REAPER inspired by Pandabot's ChordGun. 50+ chord types, intelligent next-chord suggestions, trailing chord history, humanized arpeggiation, chord finder with piano, and drag-to-assign key bindings.
## Features
- 50+ chord types: triads, 6ths, 7ths, 9ths, 11ths, 13ths, altered dominants, and extended jazz voicings up to 10 notes - Full scrollable chord grid showing every chord type on every scale degree at once, organized by category - Next-chord suggestion engine that lights up the grid based on harmonic compatibility - Current chord gold highlight and trailing chord history showing your harmonic path - Arpeggiate mode with adjustable delay and Round Robin humanize for organic timing/velocity - Per-degree key bindings with independent octave offset and inversion per degree - Drag chords from the grid to degree slots to assign them to number keys - 3-octave chord finder piano for identifying chords by clicking notes - 7 modes: Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian - Adjustable text size (S/M/L/XL) - Window size and position persist between sessions - All settings persist with the project
## Keyboard Shortcuts
- 1-7: Play assigned chord for that scale degree - 0: Stop all notes - A: Toggle arpeggiate - Up/Down: Scroll grid - Esc: Close
## Source
https://github.com/del-paso/AdvancedChordGun

version.author: del-paso
version.changelog: v2.0: - Per-degree octave offset and inversion controls - Drag-and-drop chord assignment from grid to degree slots - 3-octave chord finder piano with individual key highlighting - Adjustable text size (S/M/L/XL) with +/- controls - Window size and position persist between sessions - Trail/Arp toggle overlap bug fixed - Clear button for chord finder redesigned as proper button
